nodes.label: Lista de Compras
nodes.description: Shopping list progressive web application with real-time Firebase sync, theme selection, purchase history, and item CRUD.

nodes.label: PWA Manifest
nodes.description: Progressive Web App with site.webmanifest, theme-color meta, and app icons for installability.

nodes.label: Formulário de Item
nodes.description: Item entry form with unit selection (un/kg), name, price, and quantity fields. Supports add and edit modes.

nodes.label: Painel de Totais
nodes.description: Dashboard panel showing total item count, marked/total ratio, and total purchase value (R$).

nodes.label: Toast de Notificação
nodes.description: Floating toast notification with success/error/info types and auto-dismiss.

nodes.label: Modal de Temas
nodes.description: Theme picker modal with 9 color palettes (azul, verde, violeta, vermelho, laranja, amarelo, anil, rosa, escuro).

nodes.label: Modal de Histórico
nodes.description: Purchase history bottom sheet showing past finalized purchases with item breakdowns.

nodes.label: App Icon 192x192
nodes.description: PWA app icon at 192x192 resolution for install prompts and home screen.

nodes.label: App Icon 512x512
nodes.description: PWA app icon at 512x512 resolution for splash screens and high-DPI displays.
